@graph.name: Land Rover models fitted with the M57 Td6

itemListElement.name: Land Rover Range Rover L322 TD6

mainEntity.name: How much does an M57 Td6 engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned M57 Td6 typically costs £1,500–£2,500 supply only, with used units from £600–£1,200. Fitting adds £800–£1,200 depending on labour rates and vehicle access.

mainEntity.name: Is the M57 Td6 a reliable engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the M57 is widely considered one of BMW's most reliable diesel engines, winning the International Engine of the Year award in its class for 1999–2002 and again in 2009. With proper maintenance, many exceed 200,000 miles.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common M57 Td6 failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Swirl flap failure is the most critical — these metal flaps in the intake manifold can break off and be sucked into the engine, causing catastrophic cylinder damage. Turbocharger wear, injector issues, and timing chain stretch are also common.

mainEntity.name: Which Land Rover models use the M57 Td6?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Land Rover application, the M57 Td6 powered the Range Rover L322 from 2002 to 2006, badged as the TD6. The engine was also used across BMW's 3, 5, 6, 7 Series, X3, X5, and Z4 models.

mainEntity.name: Is the Land Rover M57 Td6 the same as BMW's version?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the M57D30 engine is mechanically identical across BMW and Land Rover fitments. Land Rover used a slightly detuned version (177 hp) compared to some BMW applications, but the core engine, block, and internals are the same.

verdictRating.oneLineVerdict: The M57 is one of BMW's finest diesel sixes — robust, refined, and long-lived — but swirl flaps and turbo wear need attention — buy with full service history.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Also powers numerous BMW models including the 3 Series (E46/E90), 5 Series (E39/E60), X5 (E53/E70), and 7 Series (E65/E66).

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting an M57 Td6 typically takes 10–14 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [THIRD-PARTY].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Parts cost is identical across BMW and Land Rover applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access.
